Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Empty Ghost]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — The Empty Ghost is the name given to Wei Shi Lindon Arelius as a temporary replacement for the Silent King and the fourth Dreadgod.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Malice called Lindon the Empty Ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — The Empty Ghost is a Dreadgod-like presence that Lindon can manifest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The people of Serpent’s Grave have heard about the Empty Ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Malice feared the Empty Ghost might follow her through the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Empty Ghost is an entity or event that Northstrider intends to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Empty Ghost triggers an intruder alert in Northstrider's oracle codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — No single Monarch can take on the Empty Ghost alone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Empty Ghost is a name given to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Empty Ghost went to battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Silent Servants treat Lindon as the new Silent King.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
